item.text: {"output":"Implemented T4 by routing the in-scope single-task readers and writers through one canonical React Query plus realtime-store seeding path. `useGetTask` now preserves `resolveTaskProjectScope()` and empty-id disabling while returning narrow store snapshots when available, seeding scoped task snapshots from cached or fetched query results, and keeping React Query authoritative for fetch lifecycle. Updated `useTaskPrefetch`, generation-task cache helpers, `RealtimeProvider` fallback fetches, and `useVariantSourceTask` to use the same helpers, so `taskQueryKeys.single(...)` readers and writers in scope no longer diverge.
